task_completion.description: Agent navigates the map view to Washington D.C., specifically the National Mall area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main map viewport shows the geography of Washington D.C., recognizable by the Potomac River and the layout of the National Mall.

task_completion.description: Agent opens the 'New Image Overlay' or 'Google Earth - New Image Overlay' dialog box.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box titled 'New Image Overlay' or similar properties window is visible on screen.

task_completion.description: Agent enters the correct name for the overlay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Name field of the dialog, the text 'L'Enfant Plan 1791' is entered.

task_completion.description: Agent selects the correct image file for the overlay.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Link or Image path field, the filename 'lenfant_plan_1791.jpg' (or full path ending in this) is visible.

task_completion.description: Agent adjusts the transparency/opacity to approximately 50%.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Transparency slider in the dialog is positioned near the middle, or an opacity value indicates roughly 50%.

task_completion.description: The historical map overlay is visible on the map and covers the area from the Capitol to the Lincoln Memorial.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The map viewport shows the historical L'Enfant plan image superimposed over the National Mall area. The overlay should span roughly from the Capitol building location to the Lincoln Memorial location.

task_completion.description: The overlay is saved and appears in the 'My Places' sidebar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Places' sidebar (usually on the left), an item named 'L'Enfant Plan 1791' is listed under the 'My Places' folder.

integrity.description: Agent uses the application's GUI to create the overlay rather than command-line scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with menus, dialog boxes, and the map interface, not a terminal window generating KML files.

integrity.description: Agent performs the task within the Google Earth (or equivalent GIS) application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application interface matches Google Earth Pro or the designated mapping software, not a generic image viewer or web browser.

integrity.description: The result is a functional map object, not just a screenshot of the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'L'Enfant Plan 1791' item appears as a selectable object in the sidebar, confirming it is a registered element in the software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct overlay name is 'L'Enfant Plan 1791'. The source image file is 'lenfant_plan_1791.jpg'. The location is the National Mall in Washington D.C. (approx 38.889°N, 77.035°W). The overlay should be semi-transparent (approx 50%) and cover the span between the US Capitol and the Lincoln Memorial.
